visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a leopard-print cap and a grey long-sleeved crop top speaking outdoors on a sidewalk. She is gesturing with her hands, wearing several rings. The background shows a city street with cars and a modern grey building. (2) A quick cut shows the exterior of 'Songshan Station' (松山車站), a large circular building with a curved glass facade and green trees in front. (3) A man in a yellow button-down shirt and a white beanie is seen standing next to a bus stop pole on a city street, pointing at the sign. (4) The man and the woman are seen walking together on a wide, tiled urban sidewalk, smiling and opening their arms wide in an excited gesture. (5) The scene shifts indoors to what appears to be an airport terminal or service center. The man, now in a black jacket over a striped shirt, talks while holding travel documents and passports. (6) A close-up shot focuses on a price board and promotional leaflets detailing travel benefits, including free shuttle bus information and vouchers. (7) The man is shown outside in front of a white coach bus, pointing to a sign in the window that mentions 'Free Shuttle Bus' for specific travelers. (8) The man stands in an open courtyard in front of a traditional Japanese-style building with a red and white exterior, holding up a small ticket or coupon. (9) The woman is shown again, smiling and talking near a white banner with a black crest in an outdoor park-like setting. (10) The man concludes the video standing near a staircase, gesturing emphatically as large text graphics appear on the screen regarding an event in 2026.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 是坐捷運就可以到的那個. (2) [Subtitle]: 松山車站. (3) [Subtitle]: 松山一番町好不好. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們又回到愛媛. [Variety]: 又. (5) [Subtitle]: 第二次來 我們這熟門熟路了. (6) [Subtitle]: 已經算熟門熟路了. (7) [Subtitle]: 大廳這邊吼. [Logo]: 綜合案內所. (8) [Subtitle]: 那個information這邊. [Logo]: INFO. (9) [Subtitle]: 你就憑護照. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後還有我們長榮的機票. (11) [Subtitle]: 可以來領 台灣自由行喔. (12) [Subtitle]: 自由行旅客限定! [Slogan]: 免費的接駁巴士. (13) [Subtitle]: 這邊還有免費券. (14) [Subtitle]: 一定要記得來領喔. (15) [Subtitle]: 巴士就在這一邊. (16) [Subtitle]: 台灣自由行旅客 專用免費巴士. (17) [Subtitle]: 飛鳥乃湯泉. (18) [Subtitle]: 這邊就有免費的泡湯券. (19) [Subtitle]: 2026 一月二十四-一月二十五. (20) [Subtitle]: 台中清水服務區. (21) [Subtitle]: 愛媛觀光物產推廣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female companion, and approximately 6 passers-by visible across various scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main man wears a yellow short-sleeved shirt and white beanie, then switches to a black cardigan; the main woman wears a grey crop top and leopard cap, later a black and white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between busy city streets in Taiwan (Songshan), an airport terminal in Matsuyama, Japan, a bus stop, and various historical/cultural sites in Ehime prefecture, including traditional Japanese architecture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with a bright, energetic tone, accompanied by a low hum of outdoor traffic. (2) A male voice enters abruptly with higher intensity and volume, marking a transition. (3) An upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track begins, playing consistently underneath the dialogue. (4) The male and female voices overlap briefly with excited laughter and high-pitched exclamations. (5) The male voice delivers a clear, narrative explanation with professional articulation; background chatter of an indoor terminal is audible. (6) A short 'whoosh' sound effect emphasizes a visual transition to documents. (7) Outdoor wind noise is audible alongside the male speaker's voice as he explains the bus features. (8) The music continues to drive the rhythm, maintaining a positive and promotional atmosphere until the final high-energy speech segment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Introduction -> Benefit Explanation -> Practical Demonstration -> Future Event Teaser
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote tourism to Matsuyama, Ehime, Japan, by informing Taiwanese travelers about specific travel benefits (free shuttle buses, onsen coupons) available for EVA Air passengers, ending with an announcement for a 2026 promotional event in Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speakers directly mention 'EVA Air' tickets and specific travel benefits provided by the Ehime tourism board.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality travel vlog with professional editing and clear promotional intent targeting Taiwanese tourists.
